name: Huntress
description: Monitor Huntress managed detection and response (MDR/EDR) platform for incident reports, agent status, and threat detection compliance

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: API Key from Account Settings > API Credentials in Huntress portal

credentialFields.helpText: Secret Key from Account Settings > API Credentials in Huntress portal

checks.name: Incident Response

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Reviews Huntress agent deployment and device protection status across endpoints

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies threat monitoring and alerting capabilities are active across organizations
